name: connectors
description: Connector body (housing/shell) envelope dimensions for common PC/SBC panel and slot connectors — USB-A/C/micro, RJ45, HDMI (A/mini/micro), PCIe card-edge slot, 2.54mm GPIO header. See RESEARCH.md for per-type evidence and tiering.
sources: Molex 87715 series (PCIe x16 card-edge socket) — named part, not fetched this pass (Molex product pages are a JS SPA); backs pcie_x16 //VERIFY
